name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: CustomAppBar
desc: A reusable custom AppBar widget with a back button and centered title.

name: CustomAppBar.new
desc: Creates a CustomAppBar.

name: build
desc: Builds the AppBar UI.

name: preferredSize
desc: Defines the preferred height of the AppBar.

name: title
desc: The title displayed in the AppBar.

name: EmergencyCallButton
desc:
A styled button that shows a reminder notification then dials an
emergency phone number.

name: EmergencyCallButton.new
desc: Creates an EmergencyCallButton.

name: build
desc: Builds the emergency call button with a phone icon and label.

name: label
desc: Optional label text; falls back to the localised 'call_now' string.

name: phoneNumber
desc: The phone number to dial when the button is tapped.

name: EmergencyCallScreen
desc: Displays Thai medical and general emergency numbers with a call button.

name: EmergencyCallScreen.new
desc: Creates an EmergencyCallScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the emergency call screen with a grouped number list,
an EmergencyCallButton, and a scroll-down navigation indicator.

name: enContent
desc: All English locale content used by LanguageProvider.

name: FindHospitalScreen
desc: A screen that helps users locate nearby hospitals based on their current GPS position.

name: FindHospitalScreen.new
desc: Creates the find hospital screen.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: HelpScreen
desc: Displays a localised help guide for the StayAlive app.

name: HelpScreen.new
desc: Creates a HelpScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the help screen as a ListView of section cards
sourced from LanguageProvider.

name: HomeScreen
desc: The main home screen and navigation hub of the application.

name: HomeScreen.new
desc: Creates a HomeScreen.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: HospitalService
desc: A service class for fetching hospital data and handling map routing.

name: fetchNearbyHospitals
desc: Fetches nearby hospitals within a 10km radius from the given position.

name: openRealMap
desc: Opens the external map application to the specified coordinates.

name: HowToCprScreen
desc: A scrollable CPR reference screen embedded in the tutorial flow.

name: HowToCprScreen.new
desc: Creates a HowToCprScreen.

name: build
desc: Builds the CPR reference content as a scrollable ListView.

name: LanguageProvider
desc: Manages the active locale and provides all localised content.

name: StayAliveApp
desc: Root widget of the application.

name: StayAliveApp.new
desc: Creates the main application widget.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: isDarkMode
desc: Whether the app should start in dark mode.

name: main
desc: Entry point of the application.

name: MedicalReferencesScreen
desc: Displays medical references and a reviewer card for the StayAlive app.

name: MedicalReferencesScreen.new
desc: Creates a MedicalReferencesScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the medical references screen with a reviewer card and
a scrollable list of reference entries from LanguageProvider.

name: NotificationProvider
desc: Manages the notification permission and enabled state.

name: NotificationProvider.new
desc: Creates a NotificationProvider and loads persisted preferences.

name: notificationsEnabled
desc: Whether push notifications are currently enabled.

name: toggleNotifications
desc: Toggles notifications on or off and persists the change.

name: NotificationService
desc: Singleton service for managing local notifications.

name: NotificationService.new
desc: Returns the singleton instance of NotificationService.

name: flutterLocalNotificationsPlugin
desc: The underlying local notifications plugin instance.

name: init
desc: Initialises the notification plugin for Android and iOS.

name: requestPermissions
desc: Requests the system notification permission from the user.

name: showNotification
desc: Displays a local notification if notifications are enabled.

name: PrivacyPolicyScreen
desc: Displays the Privacy Policy content sourced from LanguageProvider.

name: PrivacyPolicyScreen.new
desc: Creates a PrivacyPolicyScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the privacy policy screen with a timestamp and
a scrollable list of sections from LanguageProvider.

name: PrivacyProvider
desc: Manages Terms acceptance and location permission state.

name: PrivacyProvider.new
desc: Creates a PrivacyProvider and loads persisted preferences.

name: hasAcceptedTerms
desc: Whether the user has accepted the Terms and Conditions.

name: locationEnabled
desc: Whether location permission is currently enabled.

name: toggleLocation
desc: Requests location permission and updates the enabled state.

name: toggleTerms
desc: Updates the Terms acceptance state and persists the change.

name: PrivacySettingsScreen
desc: Screen for managing privacy-related permissions and consent.

name: PrivacySettingsScreen.new
desc: Creates a PrivacySettingsScreen.

name: build
desc: Builds the privacy settings screen with location and T&C toggles.

name: QuickGuideCard
desc: A single step card displayed in the quick guide list.

name: QuickGuideCard.new
desc: Creates a QuickGuideCard.

name: build
desc:
Builds the guide card with a numbered green header, description text,
an optional image, and an optional key-points highlight box.

name: description
desc: The body description text for this step.

name: imagePath
desc: Optional image asset path displayed above the description.

name: keyPoints
desc: Optional bullet-point key tips shown in a highlight box.

name: number
desc: The step number displayed in the card header badge.

name: title
desc: The step title displayed in the green header bar.

name: QuickGuideScreen
desc: Scrollable quick-guide screen for emergency CPR response.

name: QuickGuideScreen.new
desc: Creates a QuickGuideScreen.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: QuickTestScreen
desc: Interactive multiple-choice quiz to test CPR and first-aid knowledge.

name: QuickTestScreen.new
desc: Creates a QuickTestScreen.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: ScrollDownIndicator
desc: A visual indicator displaying text and a downward arrow at the bottom of the screen.

name: ScrollDownIndicator.new
desc: Creates a ScrollDownIndicator with the specified text.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: text
desc: The text displayed above the arrow icon.

name: ScrollNavigatorWrapper
desc: A wrapper that handles overscroll logic to prevent jitter and duplicate navigation.

name: ScrollNavigatorWrapper.new
desc: Creates a ScrollNavigatorWrapper with the given child and navigation callback.

name: child
desc: The widget below this widget in the tree.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: onNavigate
desc: The callback to execute when the overscroll threshold is reached.

name: SettingsScreen
desc: Main settings screen for configuring app preferences.

name: SettingsScreen.new
desc: Creates a SettingsScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the settings screen with grouped sections for user
preferences, display options, support links, and footer links.

name: ShadowCard
desc: A custom card widget that provides a stylized container with an optional header and child content.

name: ShadowCard.new
desc: Creates a ShadowCard with the given styling and content.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: child
desc: The widget displayed below the header inside the card body.

name: color
desc: The background color of the card.

name: emoji
desc: The emoji character displayed in the header icon.

name: isSelected
desc: Whether the card is currently selected, which applies a highlighted border.

name: onTap
desc: The callback executed when the card is tapped.

name: subtitle
desc: The secondary text displayed below the title.

name: textScaleRatio
desc: The scaling factor for text elements inside the header.

name: title
desc: The primary title displayed in the header.

name: LoadingScreen
desc: The initial splash screen displayed when the application launches.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: initialIsDark
desc: Whether the app should render its initial state in dark mode.

name: SymptomCheckCard
desc: Displays an interactive symptom-checking card.

name: SymptomCheckCard
desc: Interactive symptom-check card that evaluates CPR necessity.

name: SymptomCheckCard.new
desc: Creates a SymptomCheckCard.

name: SymptomCheckCard.new
desc: Creates a SymptomCheckCard.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: TermsAndConditionsConsentScreen
desc: First-launch consent screen requiring the user to accept T&C.

name: TermsAndConditionsConsentScreen.new
desc: Creates a TermsAndConditionsConsentScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the consent screen with a close button, scrollable T&C
content, and an "I agree" button.

name: TermsScreen
desc: Read-only screen that displays the Terms and Conditions.

name: TermsScreen.new
desc: Creates a TermsScreen.

name: build
desc:
Builds the terms screen with a last-updated timestamp and
a scrollable list of T&C sections from LanguageProvider.

name: thContent
desc: All Thai locale content used by LanguageProvider.

name: ThemeProvider
desc: Manages the app's active theme mode and font size scaling.

name: ThemeProvider.new
desc: Creates a ThemeProvider and loads persisted preferences.

name: fontSizeFactor
desc: The current font size scaling factor, clamped between 0.8 and 1.0.

name: isDarkMode
desc: Whether dark mode is currently active.

name: setFontSizeFactor
desc: Sets the font size scaling factor and persists the change.

name: themeMode
desc:
Returns ThemeMode.dark when dark mode is active,
otherwise returns ThemeMode.light.

name: toggleTheme
desc: Toggles between dark and light theme and persists the change.

name: TutorialScreen
desc: Full-screen tutorial displayed on the first app launch.

name: TutorialScreen.new
desc: Creates a TutorialScreen.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.
